_metadata.name: normal
_metadata.description: Standard single-column documentation template with sidebar and dark/light theme toggle
_metadata.author: MDOne

_comment_toc: Enable table of contents in sidebar. levels: array of heading levels to include (e.g. [2, 3] for h2-h3). Set enabled to false to disable TOC.
_comment_extra_css_urls: CDN/external CSS URLs injected as <link rel='stylesheet'> in <head>. Example: ['https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/highlight.js/styles/github.css']
_comment_extra_css_inline: Local CSS filenames (relative to this template folder) to inline as <style> blocks. Example: ['custom.css']
_comment_extra_js_urls: CDN/external JS URLs injected as <script src='...'> before </body>. Example: ['https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/highlight.js/highlight.min.js']
_comment_extra_js_inline: Local JS filenames (relative to this template folder) to inline as <script> blocks. Example: ['analytics.js']
